title: leymus flexilis
intro: Leymus flexilis, also known as big bluestem, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Leymus flexilis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Leymus flexilis can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
